sys_security_acl.description: Default access control on x_153465_discovert_discover_tasker_response 2.8.6 | 2025-05-23 | raj | STRY0158283 - (DEFECT) As a basic user, users are able to see ALL task logs, email request, tasks, and response logs even of tasks they shouldn't
sys_security_acl.name: x_153465_discovert_discover_tasker_response
